news.title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 is back
news.title_en: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 is back
news.summary: After a rollercoaster negotiation process with the Trump administration that dragged on for two weeks, Anthropic's Mythos 5 is finally back in action - at least, somewhat, for a select group of organizations, according to a letter from the government to Anthropic that was viewed by The Verge. Fable
news.summary_translated: 在与特朗普政府长达两周的过山车式谈判后，Anthropic的Mythos 5终于重新投入使用——至少在一定程度上，面向特定组织群体。据The Verge获取的一份政府致Anthropic的信函显示，Fable
news.importance_reason: LeCun观点讨论，有学术价值但非行业紧急事件

news.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
news.title_en: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
news.summary: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”
news.summary_translated: OpenAI表示：“我们认为，这种政府准入程序不应成为长期默认模式。它阻碍了最优秀的工具被用户、开发者、企业、网络防御者以及全球合作伙伴所使用，而这些群体恰恰需要这些工具。”

news.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
news.title_en: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
news.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out
news.summary_translated: 英伟达多年来一直主导着AI芯片市场，但完全依赖它的时代可能即将结束。OpenAI刚刚公布了其计划，将与博通合作打造名为“Jalapeño”的定制推理芯片，加入谷歌、苹果和SpaceX等越来越多自行研发芯片的企业行列。
news.importance_reason: MIT提出新训练方法，学术进展但尚未落地

news.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
news.title_en: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
news.summary: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.
news.summary_translated: 人工智能模型已经发展到其能力能产生实际政治影响的地步。应对这些影响需要集体行动。

news.summary_translated: 多年来，英伟达一直主导着AI芯片市场，但完全依赖英伟达的时代可能即将结束。OpenAI刚刚公布了其与博通合作开发的定制推理芯片Jalapeño的计划，加入谷歌、苹果和SpaceX等越来越多自行研发芯片的公司行列。

news.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
news.title_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
news.summary: Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here. news.summary_translated: OpenAI应特朗普政府要求推迟发布下一代模型的消息传出不到24小时，该模型GPT-5.6便已问世。周五，该公司发布了其全新GPT-5.6模型套件的有限预览版：旗舰级模型Sol，以及面向"高价值应用"的中端模型Terra。

news.title: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.
news.title_en: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.
news.summary: It’s been hot in London this week. Really hot. A dangerous heat wave has hit Western Europe. Yesterday, the UK recorded its highest ever June temperature at 36.1 °C (about 97 °F). But as the weather app on my phone confirmed, it felt like 39 °C. It’s frightening that we are seeing such temperatures
news.summary_translated: 伦敦这周很热，非常热。危险的极端高温天气席卷了西欧。昨天，英国录得了有史以来6月份的最高温——36.1摄氏度。但正如我手机上的天气应用所显示的，体感温度达到了39摄氏度。看到这样的温度出现在6月，真是令人恐惧。

news.title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request

news.summary_translated: 据报道，出于对潜在安全问题的担忧，特朗普政府已要求OpenAI分阶段发布其重磅新模型GPT-5.6。据The Information报道，OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼周三在公司问答环节中告诉员工，GPT-5.6将以有限预览形式发布。

news.title: What Europe’s heat wave means for the power grid

news.title: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
news.title_en: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
news.summary: IBM has built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail, which is twice the density of the company’s previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021. The design could pave the way for faster and more energy efficient computers for years to co
news.summary_translated: IBM公司研发出一种新型原型芯片，在指甲盖大小的面积上集成了约1000亿个晶体管，密度是该公司2021年发布的最先进技术的两倍。这一设计有望为未来多年内更快、更节能的计算机铺平道路。

news.title: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
news.title_en: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
news.summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI." Luna issued the response after accounts on X began sharing screenshots of an amen
news.summary_translated: 佛罗里达州共和党众议员安娜·保利娜·卢纳表示，她的工作人员在一项重大国防法案的修正案摘要中使用了人工智能进行“拼写检查”，但否认将其用于法案正文，并称“任何立法都从未使用人工智能起草”。卢纳是在X平台上的账号开始分享一份修正案截图后作出回应的。

news.title: Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants
news.title_en: Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants
news.summary: Europe is in the middle of a record-breaking heat wave, and the grid is being pushed to its limits as people turn to fans and air-conditioning to try to stay cool. Some power plants won’t be online to help handle the load. On June 23, France saw its hottest day since record-keeping began in 1947.…

news.title: The Download: introducing the Engineering issue
news.title_en: The Download: introducing the Engineering issue
news.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing: the Engineering issue We can’t fix everything, but we can be ambitious. We can take on the challenge of making the world better through human ingenui
news.summary_translated: 这是《每日下载》今日版，我们的工作日通讯，为您每日提供科技世界的最新动态。本期特辑：工程专题。我们无法解决所有问题，但我们可以雄心勃勃。我们可以迎接挑战，通过人类的智慧让世界变得更美好。
news.importance_reason: 行业观点文章，缺乏独家信息，影响力有限

news.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
news.title_en: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
news.summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google a
news.summary_translated: 25年来，谷歌搜索框一直是计算机领域最知名的界面之一：一个细长的白色矩形、一个闪烁的光标、几个输入的文字和一串蓝色链接。本周二，谷歌将正式告别这种模式。在年度I/O开发者大会上，谷歌
news.importance_reason: 中型AI公司融资，商业动态但影响力中等

news.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
news.title_en: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
news.summary: Railway , a San Francisco-based cloud platform that has quietly amassed two million developers without spending a dollar on marketing, announced Thursday that it raised $100 million in a Series B funding round, as surging demand for artificial intelligence applications exposes the limitations of leg
news.summary_translated: 总部位于旧金山的云平台Railway，在未投入任何营销费用的情况下，悄然积累了200万开发者。该公司周四宣布，在B轮融资中筹集了1亿美元。随着人工智能应用需求的激增，传统基础设施的局限性日益凸显。
news.importance_reason: 多模态技术新进展，技术突破有潜力，受众较广

news.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
news.title_en: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
news.summary: The artificial intelligence coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive. Claude Code , Anthropic's terminal-based AI agent that can write, debug, and deploy code autonomously, has captured the imagination of software developers worldwide. But its pricing — ranging from $20 to $200 per month
news.summary_translated: 人工智能编程革命有一个代价：它很昂贵。Anthropic公司推出的终端AI代理Claude Code，能够自主编写、调试和部署代码，已吸引了全球软件开发者的目光。但其月费从20美元到200美元不等。
news.importance_reason: 地方性AI监管政策，影响范围有限，时效性一般

news.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
news.title_en: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
news.summary: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs , needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg's $100 million offers seemed impossible. So he spent $5,000 — a fifth of his marketing budget — on a billboard in San Francisco displaying what looked like
news.summary_translated: 阿尔弗雷德·瓦尔福斯已无计可施。他的初创公司Listen Labs需要招聘100多名工程师，但与马克·扎克伯格开出的1亿美元薪酬竞争似乎毫无胜算。于是他花了5000美元——占营销预算的五分之一——在旧金山竖起一块广告牌，上面展示着看似……
news.importance_reason: OpenAI发布GPT-5，性能大幅提升，是基础模型领域的里程碑事件

news.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
news.title_en: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
news.summary: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification tool into what executives describe as a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf
news.summary_translated: Salesforce于周二推出了全面重建版的Slackbot，该公司的工作场所助手从简单的通知工具转变为高管所称的全功能AI代理，能够搜索企业数据、起草文档并代表用户采取行动。
news.importance_reason: Anthropic获微软数十亿美元投资，头部公司重大融资动态

news.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
news.title_en: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
news.summary: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users — and according to company insiders, the team built the entire feature in approximately a week and a half, largely using Claude Code itself. The laun
news.summary_translated: Anthropic于周一发布了Cowork，这是一项新的AI代理功能，将其大获成功的Claude Code工具的能力扩展至非技术用户。据公司内部人士透露，该团队仅用大约一周半时间就构建了整个功能，且主要借助Claude Code本身完成。
news.importance_reason: 谷歌实现量子计算突破，对AI算力有潜在颠覆性影响

news.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment
news.title_en: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment
news.summary: Nous Research , the open-source artificial intelligence startup backed by crypto venture firm Paradigm , released a new competitive programming model on Monday that it says matches or exceeds several larger proprietary systems — trained in just four days using 48 of Nvidia's latest B200 graphics pro
news.summary_translated: 开源人工智能初创公司Nous Research（由加密风投公司Paradigm支持）于周一发布了一款新的竞技编程模型。该公司称，该模型在性能上可与多个规模更大的专有系统相媲美甚至更胜一筹——而训练仅耗时四天，使用了48块英伟达最新B200图形处理器。
news.importance_reason: Meta发布AI视频编辑工具，产品应用层面有影响力

concepts.definition: 将单一模型拆分成多个版本或规格的产品系列。
concepts.explanation: 就像苹果芯片有M1、M1 Pro、M1 Max、M1 Ultra一样，OpenAI把GPT-5.6做成了产品矩阵，而不是一个单一的模型。这意味着用户可以根据自己的需求——从轻量级聊天到重度推理——选择不同版本的GPT-5.6，而不是所有人都用同一个“万能模型”。这种策略既能覆盖更多场景（比如手机端用小模型，企业端用大模型），又能通过差异化定价和功能提升商业效率。
concepts.example: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6预览版三箭齐发，包括标准版、专业版和旗舰版，分别面向普通用户、开发者和企业级应用。

recommended_reading.title: OpenAI把GPT-5.6做成了像苹果芯片一样的产品矩阵

concepts.definition: AI模型的能力和发布受到政治因素影响。
concepts.explanation: 过去AI竞争主要是公司之间的技术竞赛，但现在模型能力已经强到能影响现实政治。比如OpenAI应政府要求延迟GPT-5.6的全面发布，Anthropic的Mythos 5被美国政府授权给超过100家公司和机构使用。这意味着AI模型不再只是技术产品，而是变成了国家安全、地缘政治博弈中的筹码。就像核技术一样，AI模型的使用和扩散开始受到政府层面的严格管控。
concepts.example: OpenAI限制GPT-5.6的发布节奏，应美国政府要求分阶段推出，并表示“这种政府介入不应成为常态”。

recommended_reading.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore: AI models have real political consequences

recommended_video.title: AI模型如何成为政治工具？

concepts.definition: 科技公司自主研发AI专用芯片以减少对英伟达的依赖。
concepts.explanation: 英伟达的GPU长期以来是AI训练的“标准配置”，就像手机行业早期所有人都用高通芯片一样。但现在OpenAI、SpaceX等公司都在自研芯片，目的是摆脱对英伟达的依赖。这就像苹果从英特尔芯片转向自研M系列芯片——不仅能降低成本，还能针对自己的AI模型做硬件优化。OpenAI的“Jalapeño芯片”就是这种趋势的代表，它可能比通用GPU更高效。
concepts.example: OpenAI推出代号“Jalapeño”的自研AI芯片，旨在替代英伟达GPU用于模型训练和推理。

recommended_reading.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)

recommended_video.title: AI芯片战争：为什么巨头都在抛弃英伟达？

deep_reads.title: GPT-5.6来了：旗舰版碾压GPT-5.5，价格却没涨
deep_reads.ai_summary: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6，旗舰版在多项基准测试中大幅超越GPT-5.5，但价格保持不变。文章分析了模型矩阵策略背后的商业逻辑：通过分档定价吸引不同层级的用户，同时用旗舰版树立技术标杆。还讨论了在政府监管压力下，OpenAI如何平衡技术创新与合规要求。

deep_reads.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore: AI models have real political consequences
deep_reads.ai_summary: 文章指出AI竞争已从公司间技术竞赛升级为政治博弈。Anthropic的Mythos 5被美国政府授权给超过100家企业和机构使用，而OpenAI被迫分阶段发布GPT-5.6。作者认为，当模型能力足以影响选举、舆论和国家安全时，技术决策不可避免地变成政治决策。文章呼吁行业建立透明的治理框架。

deep_reads.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño chip is Big Tech’s spiciest move away from Nvidia
deep_reads.ai_summary: OpenAI自研芯片Jalapeño曝光，标志着科技巨头集体摆脱英伟达依赖的趋势。文章对比了谷歌TPU、亚马逊Trainium和OpenAI新芯片的设计思路，指出自研芯片能在特定AI任务上实现更高能效比。同时分析了英伟达面临的挑战：当客户变成竞争对手时，其垄断地位可能被动摇。

videos.title: GPT-5.6产品矩阵深度解析：苹果芯片式策略能否成功？
videos.ai_summary: 视频详细解读OpenAI如何借鉴苹果芯片策略，将GPT-5.6拆分为多个版本，并分析这种策略对开发者生态和商业模式的影响。

videos.title: AI芯片战争：为什么巨头都在抛弃英伟达？
videos.ai_summary: 视频梳理了从英伟达一家独大到OpenAI、谷歌、亚马逊纷纷自研芯片的行业变迁，解释了自研芯片在成本、性能和战略自主性上的优势。

daily_question.question: 对比OpenAI的GPT-5.6分阶段发布（应政府要求）与Anthropic的Mythos 5被授权给100多家机构使用，这两种模式分别反映了怎样的AI治理思路？哪一种更有利于行业健康发展？
daily_question.answer: OpenAI的模式是“政府介入下的渐进式发布”，即政府要求企业分阶段推出模型，以便评估风险。这体现了审慎监管的思路，但OpenAI也警告这种介入不应成为常态。Anthropic的模式则是“政府授权下的定向扩散”，即政府主动将模型授权给特定企业和机构使用，更像是“武器级”技术的有控分发。这两种模式反映了AI治理的核心矛盾：安全与开放。OpenAI的模式更偏向“先试水再推广”，给了市场和技术调整的空间，但可能因监管滞后而带来风险；Anthropic的模式则更强调“谁可以用”的权限控制，但可能造成技术垄断和准入不公。从行业健康发展角度看，一个平衡的框架应该像软件开源社区那样：有透明的安全评估标准、多元的使用权限机制，以及动态调整的监管规则，而不是完全由政治指令决定。
